title: Multispeciality Hospital in Nayandahalli, Bangalore | Spandana Hospital
heading: OUR EXPERIENCED MEDICAL PROFESSIONALS
description: Spandana Hospital in Nayandahalli, Bangalore, is a comprehensive multispeciality medical center, providing expert care across a wide range of healthcare needs.

Emergency Care We at Spandana are committed to sharing the best practices with you, so you too can help us save lives. WELCOME TO SPANDANA HOSPITALS Spandana Institute of Mental Health and Neurological Sciences
(SIMHANS) has been in the service of rehabilitating addicts and
mentally ill patients for 15 years now. Over the years, it has successfully
treated more than 3000 patients and is currently home to 75 patients
who are in the various stages of rehabilitation. Building on a legacy of more than 40 years of offering affordable health care, Spandana Multi-speciality Hospital is the latest venture looking to serve the people of the locality. The hospital comes equipped with the latest and advanced equipment along with doctors trained in their respective fields both in India and abroad. READ MORE CENTERS OF EXCELLENCE Gastroenterology Spandana Hospitals has the best facilities and resources available in-house to manage issues related to hepatobiliary and digestive systems. These issues can occur to both children and adults, and we have the required expertise to assist all in recovering quickly. Discover Cardiology Spandana Hospitals have become one of the best cardiology centres in Bangalore. It has every single aspect related to cardiology covered to serve its patients in the most proficient manner. Not only do we have the best facilities, top heart programs and advanced medical Discover Hepatology When it comes to Hepatology, it is basically a medicine department that deals with issues related to the liver, pancreas, gallbladder, and bile ducts. It is one of the sub-domains of gastroenterology and has become one of the primary medical fields in the last few decades. Discover Liver and Pancreas Surgery If you are looking for the best liver and Pancreas surgery centre in Bangalore, then Spandana Hospitals has to be your choice. We have the experience of assisting many who have been suffering from liver, pancreatic, and bile duct issues. We ensure that the best Discover Nephrology When it comes to Nephrology, it is a domain of medicine that completely deals with the treatment of all types of kidney diseases. We all know that there are two kidneys in the human body shaped like a bean. These organs are responsible for getting the waste and Discover Urology When it comes to Urology, it is basically a study of the urinary tract, which is also acknowledged as the drainage system of the body. It is this part of the body that processes the excretion of urine, which is basically the by product of the fluid and food that we are Discover Our Doctors Dr. Suresh Raghavaiah MBBS, MS, FHPB, FASTS HPB & Multi-Organ Transplant Surgeon Book an Appointment Dr. Seema Srinivasa MBBS, M.D Consultant Dermatologist Book an Appointment Dr. Jeevan H R MBBS, MD, DM, Transplant Hepatology Gastroenterologist & Hepatologist Book an Appointment Dr. Sandeep K M MBBS, MS Orthopaedics Book an Appointment Dr. Prabhakaran D MBBS, DNB Consultant Orthopaedics Book an Appointment Dr. Guru Prakash K V MBBS, MD Consultant Psychiatrist Book an Appointment Dr. Arun Kumar MBBS, M.D Nephrology Book an Appointment Dr. Jagadeesh H V MBBS, MD, DM consultant cardiologist Book an Appointment View All WELLNESS SUPPORT The hospital is supported by a

towards the mentally ill and
rehabilitation of addicts. 24/7 Facilities Emergency We at Spandana are committed to sharing the best practices with you, so you too can help us save lives. Laboratory Services At Spandana we are firm believers in prevention is better than cure. With the aid of early diagnosis and periodic health check-ups, several preventable diseases can be avoided.
We offer a wide range of preventive health care services, ranging from a specific health checkup to a complete health checkup. We offer a wide range of preventive health care services, ranging from a specific health checkup to a complete health checkup. Ambulance In a medical emergency, the most important thing is getting an ambulance. At Spandana we provide ambulance services with well-trained medical staff. Our Ambulances are well-equipped with advanced medical tools and equipment. Pharmacy Pharmacy is one of the key departments in a hospital that is responsible for the procurement, storage, compounding, dispensing and distribution of drugs. Pharmacists serve as a conduit between patients and doctors by disseminating drug information to the public and all other healthcare professionals. Digital X-Ray Spandana Hospital’s Department of Radiology is highly equipped with the latest technological advancements and exceptionally skilled staff who are committed to providing accurate diagnosis and radiological services. Specialist Medical Team Our team of Specialist are able to deliver the best medical care, from the contact with the patient, to the stabilization of the patient. The combination of the skills and experience of our Specialist, coupled with the availability of the very latest advanced medical equipment.
